dataset_b: juricode-jp (Phase 1 expanded + Phase 2 preview, 6,984 articles, 18 statutes)

comparison_to_3772_corpus.note: Doubling the corpus did not degrade retrieval accuracy. Semantic embedding scales gracefully.

notes: Same 8-query eval-set used in both runs to enable apples-to-apples comparison.
All 8 expected articles still ranked in top-3; same 6 queries ranked at #1.
Two municipal queries (eval-municipal-001, eval-municipal-002) consistently rank at #2 — semantically adjacent but not the expected article. Eval-set expansion to 30+ items planned (FU follow-up).
Char-based-fallback used for token_count metadata (sandbox tiktoken offline); does not affect retrieval scores.
